svg.title: IoTsmart RP2350A overview
svg.desc: IoTsmart RP2350A — SoM controller based on Raspberry Pi RP2350A
svg.text: SoM controller · Raspberry Pi RP2350A · plugs directly into IoTextra mezzanine modules
H-HOST or V-HOST connector · optional EYESPI (LCD) · Open Hardware · Open Source firmware
Part of the IoTsmart series · compatible with IoTextra mezzanine modules · Make Things Happy!
